title: Turkish Sweetcorn Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish from Turkey, featuring sweetcorn and mildly roasted spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the mildly roasted cumin powder and Turkish paprika, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the pilaf rice and cook, stirring occasionally, for 2-3 minutes.
Add the sweetcorn and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 15-20 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
